ksa_text: Design and build LLM-based application systems, including system prompt design, tool integration, retrieval pipeline, output validation, and failure mode documentation.

dcwf.top_element_label: Develop software system testing and validation procedures, programming, and documentation.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of system design tools and techniques

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Develop software system testing and validation procedures, programming, and documentation.
Knowledge of system design tools and techniques

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-T-006 (AI, Task) does not clear the weak fit inclusion threshold of 0.52. Composite score 0.4183 is insufficient to establish relevance to bioinformatics analysis, genomic data processing, and life sciences analytics at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (dcwf=0.418, onet=0.413, nice=0.409) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4183 below threshold for weak fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does AI-domain KSA AI-T-006 (composite 0.4183) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.4183 for AI domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per NIST AI RMF; EU AI Act practitioner obligations; AI-adjacent competencies appear in senior analytics IC roles at awareness level only. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Bioinformatics Technician at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms AI domain KSA at composite 0.4183 is not a standard requirement for Bioinformatics Technician at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4183, domain AI, scope weak fit. High confidence.
